backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types and state maps for a multi-feature app (expenses, reminders, attendance, customers, todos, notes, history) with access control and user approval mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the reminders data structure from OldReminder (no repeat fields) to NewReminder (with repeatUntilDate and updatedAt fields), defaulting new fields to null.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (repeat-daily reminders, startup reminder modal, customer CSV/PDF import) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summary document listing short descriptions of each frontend source file, covering components, hooks, pages, and utilities in the Crystal Atlas app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Crystal Atlas React app, setting the page title, favicon, and mounting the root div with the main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/PACKAGING.md: Guide explaining how to create a distributable release ZIP of Crystal Atlas, including prerequisites and instructions for building and packaging the frontend and backend.
frontend/release/.gitkeep: Empty placeholder file to keep the release output directory tracked in Git.
frontend/scripts/package-release.mjs: Node.js script that builds the frontend, then creates a deterministic ZIP archive of the full project source plus built assets using archiver, guided by the release manifest.
frontend/scripts/release-manifest.mjs: Defines include and exclude glob patterns for the release package and exports a shouldIncludeFile helper that checks a file path against those patterns.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that sets up React Query, app state providers, and renders a tabbed layout with all feature tabs (Deskboard, Upload, Search, Reminders, Calendar, etc.) including mobile and desktop navigation.
frontend/src/components/attendance/Atten: Form component for editing a single day's attendance entry, allowing users to set status, check-in/check-out times, and notes, with validation and permission-based locking.
Monthly calendar grid component that displays attendance entries and holidays with color-coded day cells, supporting date selection and month navigation.
UI section for exporting attendance reports as PDFs, allowing users to select a time range (week/month/year) and triggering a PDF download via export utilities.
frontend/src/components/attendance/Holid: Admin-only card component for managing holidays, displaying current-month holidays in a table and providing dialogs to add or delete festival/company-leave entries.
frontend/src/components/auth/ApprovalGat: Authorization wrapper component that checks if the authenticated user is approved or an admin, and shows an access-request UI with a submit button if they are not yet approved.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Renders a login/logout button using Internet Identity authentication, handling login state transitions and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/UserProfile: Displays a modal dialog prompting newly authenticated users to enter their name and save a profile if none exists yet.
frontend/src/components/character/Armore: Sets up a Three.js Canvas with lighting and orbit controls to render the 3D character model, with WebGL detection and error boundary fallbacks.
frontend/src/components/character/Charac: Renders the character dock UI by selecting the appropriate animation based on the active tab or reminder state and passing it to the 3D canvas.
Displays a fallback UI with a robot emoji and optional error message when the 3D character model cannot be loaded.
frontend/src/components/character/TripoC: Renders a procedurally animated geometric robot character using React Three Fiber primitives, with distinct animations for idle, walk, dance, jump, wave, celebrate, and thinking states.
frontend/src/components/customers/Custom: A dialog form for creating or editing a customer record with fields for name, email, phone, address, company, and work details.
A dialog that allows bulk importing customers from Excel or PDF files by parsing and normalizing column headers, then previewing and submitting the parsed records.
frontend/src/components/deskboard/ClockC: A React widget that displays a live digital clock (updating every second) and a mini monthly calendar with the current day highlighted.
frontend/src/components/errors/AppErrorB: A React class-based error boundary that catches render errors, unhandled promise rejections, and window errors, displaying an error card with reset and reload options.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppHeader: The top application header containing the logo, login button, attendance navigation, and controls to replace or reset the currently loaded Excel workbook.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: The main layout wrapper that composes the AppHeader, a responsive content area with an optional CharacterDock sidebar, a footer, and the InAppReminderNotifier.
frontend/src/components/layout/DesktopSi: A vertical icon-based sidebar navigation component with tooltips, grouping main app tabs, activity tabs, and conditionally rendered admin tabs based on the caller's admin status.
frontend/src/components/reminders/DailyR: A startup modal dialog that shows the authenticated user's reminders for today, appearing once per session with a short delay and dismissible via session storage.
frontend/src/components/reminders/InAppR: Renders a fixed toast notification for active reminders with sound playback support, dismiss functionality, and a fallback button to enable audio if autoplay is blocked.
frontend/src/components/reminders/TechHe: Simple presentational component that renders a circular avatar placeholder using a User icon from lucide-react.
frontend/src/components/results/ResultRo: Modal dialog that allows users to edit individual row cell values via labeled inputs, with changes intended only for export purposes.
frontend/src/components/search/ExploreHe: Card panel that embeds a Google search iframe for a given query, with a fallback alert and open-in-new-tab button if the iframe fails to load.
frontend/src/components/table/DataPrevie: Displays a scrollable, horizontally-scrollable preview table of SheetData with numbered rows, handling empty sheets and null cell values.
frontend/src/components/table/Horizontal: Wrapper component that enables horizontal scrolling for wide table content by applying overflow-x-auto and min-w-max constraints.
frontend/src/components/updateChecking/U: Search bar UI component for filtering update-checking results by keyword with configurable match type (contains or exact) and a clear button.
frontend/src/components/vlookup/VlookupA: Animated step-by-step visualization of a VLOOKUP operation, scanning rows to find a match and displaying each step with play/pause/reset controls.
frontend/src/context/ReminderEventsConte: React context provider that manages the active reminder state, exposing setActiveReminder and dismissReminder actions to consumers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useApproval.ts: Provides React Query hooks to check if the current caller is approved or an admin, and to list all user approvals for admin use.
Provides two React Query mutations: `useRequestApproval` for the current user to request approval, and `useSetApproval` for admins to set a user's approval status, both interacting with the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendance.ts: Exports React Query hooks for attendance operations including fetching/saving attendance config, checking in with a status, today's check-in with a work brief, and related cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttendanceCalendar: Fetches all attendance entries from the backend and maps them to `CalendarEvent` objects (with status labels, working time, and check-in/out details) for calendar overlay display.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalendarEvents.ts: Defines the `CalendarEvent` interface and provides stub React Query hooks for fetching, creating, and deleting calendar events; all mutations throw errors since backend support is not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomers.ts: Provides React Query hooks for full CRUD operations on customers (get, add, update, delete) plus a bulk import mutation with duplicate detection by phone or email.
frontend/src/hooks/useHolidays.ts: Exports React Query hooks to fetch global holidays, check admin status, and create/update/delete holidays via the backend, with cache invalidation for holidays and attendance summaries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInAppReminderNotif: Polls active reminders every second and fires a callback when a reminder's scheduled time is reached (within a 5-second window), while periodically cleaning up stale notified reminder IDs.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useObserveUsers.ts: Admin-only React Query hook that fetches all user approvals and their associated profiles from the backend, combining them into a list of observable users.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductivityMutati: Defines React Query mutation hooks for creating, updating, and deleting reminders, todos, and notes via the backend actor, invalidating relevant query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useProductivityQuerie: Provides React Query hooks for fetching reminders, todos, and notes from the backend, mapping raw backend types to UI-friendly interfaces.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for listing, filtering, adding, and clearing history entries via the backend actor, with a no-op placeholder for the unsupported clearHistory operation.
frontend/src/hooks/useRegularExpense.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating budget and expense data, including input validation, BigInt parsing, and history logging on successful mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and saving the current authenticated user's profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, radius, chart, sidebar), and declares reusable macOS-inspired utility classes and deskboard background styles.
frontend/src/lib/attendance/attendancePd: Maps an AttendanceSummary object into a structured ExportData format (title, headers, rows) suitable for PDF generation, and provides a helper to generate a filename for the exported attendance report.
frontend/src/lib/attendance/dateRanges.t: Provides utility functions to compute current week, month, and year date ranges as YYYY-MM-DD strings, and to format nanosecond timestamps and second durations into human-readable strings.
frontend/src/lib/character/tabAnimationM: Defines a mapping from application tab IDs to character animation types and exports a helper function that returns the appropriate animation for a given tab, defaulting to 'idle'.
frontend/src/lib/compare/compareWorkbook: Implements workbook comparison logic supporting three modes (key-presence, row, column) to identify new, updated, or unchanged rows between two SheetData objects matched by a key column.
frontend/src/lib/compare/filterCompariso: Filters an array of ComparisonRow objects by a search keyword using either exact or contains matching across all cell values and the key value.
frontend/src/lib/compare/normalizeRowSig: Provides utilities to generate deterministic JSON-serialized row signatures for equality checks and to align an old sheet's row to a new sheet's header order by mapping column names.
frontend/src/lib/excel/normalizeHeader.t: Exports functions to normalize, sanitize, and find Excel header values—handling trimming, empty placeholders, and duplicate disambiguation—for consistent cross-file header matching.
frontend/src/lib/excel/parseWorkbook.ts: Dynamically loads SheetJS from CDN and parses an Excel File object into a map of sheet names to sanitized SheetData, with timeout handling and validation.
Provides utilities to filter, sort, and aggregate expense entries by date range (weekly/monthly/yearly) and build structured export data with totals for PDF generation.
frontend/src/lib/export/branding.ts: Defines Crystal Atlas branding constants (logo and watermark paths) and provides async helpers to load those assets as base64 strings or HTMLImageElements for use in exports.
frontend/src/lib/export/exportPdf.ts: Dynamically loads jsPDF from CDN and exports tabular data to a branded landscape A4 PDF with a logo header, company info footer, centered capsule watermark, and multi-page support.
frontend/src/lib/export/exportXlsx.ts: Dynamically loads SheetJS from CDN and exports tabular data to an XLSX file with a Crystal Atlas branding title row, triggering a browser download.
frontend/src/lib/export/pdfCompanyInfo.t: Single source of truth for company contact and footer details (phone, email, tagline, website, location) used in PDF export headers and footers.
frontend/src/lib/notes/noteEncoding.ts: Encodes and decodes note title and content into a single delimited string for backend storage, using a '|||' separator.
frontend/src/lib/results/applyRowEdits.t: Merges in-memory row edits from a Map into a base row dataset by matching original row indices, returning the patched rows for export.
frontend/src/lib/results/exportFilters.t: Provides helpers to retrieve available filter columns and unique column values, and to filter a row dataset by a specific column/value pair.
frontend/src/lib/results/historyExport.t: Exports HistoryEntry arrays to Excel or PDF by mapping entry types to readable labels and delegating to the shared exportToExcel/exportToPdf utilities.
frontend/src/lib/vlookup/vlookup.ts: Implements a VLOOKUP function supporting exact and approximate matching against sheet data, returning single or multiple column values from the first matched row.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUsersTab.tsx: Admin UI tab for managing user approvals and custom date permissions, allowing admins to approve, reject, grant, or revoke permissions for users.
frontend/src/pages/AttendanceTab.tsx: Attendance management page handling check-in/check-out, work notes, attendance configuration, calendar view, and summary reporting with date range selection.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarTab.tsx: Calendar events page that displays combined user and attendance events, and allows authenticated/approved users to create and delete calendar events.
frontend/src/pages/CustomersTab.tsx: Customer management page providing a searchable table with add, edit, delete, and import functionality for customer records.
frontend/src/pages/DeskboardTab.tsx: Dashboard/home tab component that displays a clock/calendar widget, search with explore panel, upcoming reminders, todos, and notes with quick-add dialogs for each productivity item type.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryTab.tsx: History tab that lists, filters, and groups user activity history (uploads, searches, results, budget/expense changes) with support for keyword search, type filtering, and export to Excel or PDF.
frontend/src/pages/NotesTab.tsx: Notes management tab that allows authenticated users to create, view, and delete notes, displaying them sorted by last-updated date with a dialog-based creation form.
frontend/src/pages/ObserveUsersTab.tsx: Admin-only tab that displays a searchable table of all users with their principal IDs, profile names, and approval statuses, with clipboard copy support and access-denied guard for non-admins.
frontend/src/pages/RegularExpenseTab.tsx: Expense tracking tab that lets authenticated users set a monthly/daily budget and savings goal, add/edit/delete expenses by category, and export expense reports as PDF in various time ranges.
frontend/src/pages/RemindersTab.tsx: React page component for managing personal reminders, supporting create and delete operations with a dialog form that includes message, date, time, and optional repeat-until fields.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsTab.tsx: React page component that displays VLOOKUP, filter, and update-checking results in tables, with support for row editing, export filtering, and export to Excel or PDF.
frontend/src/pages/SearchTab.tsx: React page component providing VLOOKUP and column-filter search functionality against an uploaded workbook, storing results in app state and recording history entries.
frontend/src/pages/TodoTab.tsx: React page component for a to-do list that allows authenticated users to create and toggle completion of tasks, using productivity mutation and query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/UpdateCheckingTab.tsx: React page component that compares an uploaded baseline workbook against a newly uploaded Excel file by a selected key column to identify new items, storing results in app state.
frontend/src/pages/UploadTab.tsx: React component for the Upload tab that handles Excel file selection, parsing, sheet switching, and displays a data preview table while recording upload history.
frontend/src/state/appState.tsx: Global React context providing app-wide state for workbook data, search/filter/comparison results, upload status, and history, with helpers to update and reset that state.
frontend/src/utils/assets/resolveAssetUr: Utility that resolves a relative asset path to a full URL by prepending the Vite BASE_URL, supporting non-root deployments.
frontend/src/utils/attendance/configMapp: Utility functions for converting, validating, and constructing AttendanceConfig objects from form inputs, including time unit conversions between hours/minutes and seconds.
frontend/src/utils/errors/userFriendlyEr: Converts raw mutation errors (strings, Error objects, or plain objects) into human-readable messages while logging full details to the console.
frontend/src/utils/number/parseNatBigInt: Parses and validates a string into a non-negative integer bigint suitable for Canister Nat types, returning a typed success/failure result.
frontend/src/utils/principal/parsePrinci: Safely parses a Principal from a string or existing Principal instance, returning a typed success/failure result with error messages.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for WorkDesk Pro tracking existing features (daily repeat reminders, app-start reminder popup, customer PDF/Excel import) and pending feature requests including backend Reminder model updates for repeatUntilDate support.
